headlines.description: Bundesliga champions Bayer Leverkusen struck twice in the first half to beat St Pauli 2-1 on Saturday and make it three league wins in a row for the first time this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen beat St Pauli for third straight Bundesliga win

video.headline: Florian Wirtz finds the back of the net for Bayer Leverkusen

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Florian Wirtz finds the back of the net for Bayer Leverkusen) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

headlines.description: Two second-half goals from substitute Jamal Musiala gave Bundesliga leaders Bayern Munich a nervous 4-2 victory over visitors Heidenheim on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Musiala's brace helps Bayern beat Heidenheim

video.headline: Jamal Musiala's brace secures win for Bayern Munich

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Jamal Musiala finds the back of the net for Bayern Munich) 2024/12/07 ESHEET

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund's Jamie Gittens fired in a superb goal after a solo effort but his team could not get past a 1-1 draw at Borussia Moenchengladbach in the Bundesliga on Saturday and remain without an away win this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund held at Gladback despite Gittens stunner

video.headline: Kevin Stöger scores from the spot

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Kevin Stöger scores from the spot) 2024/12/07 ESHEET
